snippet: Liabilities are amounts owed to lenders and suppliers. Liabilities can also include amounts received in advance for future costs or for a future service. For schools, the most common liabilities are accounts payable, revenue in advance and co-operative loans. These are the amounts owed to creditors for the supply of goods and services. When entering creditor details check the validity of the ABN provided. Where a creditor does not have an ABN, select the most appropriate code to be entered into the ABN field. Refer to: CASES21 Finance Business Process Guide Section 3 – Creditors External Link (staff login required). Regularly review invoices awaiting payment and outstanding orders and take appropriate action. (For example, pay overdue invoices, cancel invalid invoices and orders).
